downgradeTo(address,uint256).notice: Simulate downgradeTo(to, amount) used by StreamingLoopFacet._payoutUnderlying Credits the `to` address in the local balanceOf mapping and emits Transfer

realtimeBalanceOf(address,uint256).notice: SuperToken-like: realtime balance at timestamp Matches signature: (int256 available, uint256, uint256)

realtimeBalanceOfNow(address).notice: SuperToken-like: realtime balance "now" Matches the signature used in your StreamingLoopFacet: (int256 available, uint256, uint256, uint256 timestamp)

setStream(int256,int256,uint256).notice: Configure the linear stream model (used by tests/deploys)

documentation.text: @notice Configure the linear stream model (used by tests/deploys)

@notice SuperToken-like: realtime balance at timestamp
 Matches signature: (int256 available, uint256, uint256)

@notice Simulate downgradeTo(to, amount) used by StreamingLoopFacet._payoutUnderlying
 Credits the `to` address in the local balanceOf mapping and emits Transfer

MockSuperTokenStreaming (fixed)
 - setStream(...) is present so your deploy script can set base, rate and t0
 - realtimeBalanceOfNow / realtimeBalanceOf match the signatures expected by StreamingLoopFacet
 - decimals(), name(), symbol(), balanceOf mapping and downgradeTo implemented
 - minimal ERC20-compatible helpers (allowance returns 0, transfer/approve revert to avoid accidental state changes)
